name: brain-offline-fallback
description: Brain class implements 3-tier offline fallback: Full (BM25+vec+GraphRAG), Degraded (BM25+GraphRAG), Minimal (BM25-only). _try_enable_vector() loads sqlite-vec extension then model2vec; self.vector_enabled gates all vec paths.

name: rrf-fusion-pattern
description: reciprocal_rank_fusion() fuses N result lists: score[doc_id] += 1/(k+rank) for each list. Docs appearing in multiple lists get boosted scores. k=60 default. Always include BM25 list; add vector/graph lists when available.
brain_bootstrap() only indexed docs/ and core-steps/; if neither existed sources=[] and Brain was empty
resolution: Always add common src dirs (src/lib/scripts/plugins/hooks) and cwd fallback; always call ingest()

name: brain-stop-hook-fallback-reindex
description: prism_stop_hook conductor fallback: call Brain().incremental_reindex() before build_agent_instruction() when Conductor unavailable so Brain knowledge stays current

name: brain-corrupt-error-detection
description: Brain.__init__ wraps PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL in try/except sqlite3.DatabaseError → raises BrainCorruptError with db path label. _check_db_integrity() runs PRAGMA integrity_check as secondary guard. brain_bootstrap() catches BrainCorruptError, deletes .prism/brain/*.db, retries Brain() once.

FTS5 external content table (content='docs') requires AFTER INSERT/DELETE/UPDATE triggers on the content table. Without them: (1) INSERT OR REPLACE desynchronizes FTS5 silently, (2) manual DELETE FROM docs_fts WHERE id=? is wrong syntax for content tables.
resolution: Add docs_fts_ai/ad/au triggers in _init_brain_schema() executescript; remove manual FTS5 ops from _ingest_single() and _remove_entries_by_source(). Triggers handle all sync automatically.
